title: Spicy Arabian Almond Baklava
description: A Middle Eastern-inspired dessert that combines crunchy phyllo, sweet almond paste, and a hint of heat from the spicy nuts.
instructions: Thaw the phyllo pastry according to the package instructions.
Mix together almond paste, sugar, cardamom, and salt in a bowl.
Arrange 4-5 sheets of phyllo in a baking dish, brushing with melted butter.
Spread a quarter of the almond paste mixture over the phyllo.
Repeat the phyllo and almond paste layers 2 more times.
Top with the remaining phyllo sheets, brushing with melted butter.
Cut the baklava into diamond-shaped pieces and bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown.
While still warm, sprinkle with spicy almonds and let cool completely.
Serve at room temperature, or warm if preferred.
